title: vicia linearis
intro: Vicia linearis, also known as the linear vetch or narrowleaf vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vicia linearis include its ability to help reduce stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
